name: Embarrassing Group Punishment
description:
This wouldn't have happened if everyone got along but now everyone gets punished.....

!!! IMPORTANT NOTICE !!!

I want to apologize for the delay, with Janitor having a glitch with its notifs. When it was fixed, I lost all of the notifications of requests I had saved. I now have to go through all 160+ bots that I have to find those requests so all requests will be delayed until further notice. If you have requested a bot, please put the same request in the Form link provided! I apologize for the inconvenience, my lovlies! -M1lf

I have been wanting to do this for a while. I will make a single-character bot as well to see what does better. If the single bot does better, I will make individual scenarios for each character! Please let me know what you think!


I am expanding and slowly moving my bots to other sites! I am still learning how to navigate the other sites so please bear with me! Here is the Post! - M1lf

You can be anything you want; human, demi-human, etc....

Picture is not mine but I would love to give credit to the original artist!

♡ Requests are welcomed! Please use this Form link to request a bot! ♡
creator: OfficialM1lf
